mapper.select: SELECT SEQ , CUR_HP , CUR_HP_EXT , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , REWARD , ATK_RATE , ATK_POWER , DEF_RATE , DEF_POWER , EVADE_RATE , CRIT_DEF_RATE , DEBUFF , DEBUFF1 , DEBUFF2 , HIDE_RULE , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS START_DATE FROM ( SELECT SEQ , CUR_HP , CUR_HP_EXT , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , REWARD , ATK_RATE , ATK_POWER , DEF_RATE , DEF_POWER , EVADE_RATE , CRIT_DEF_RATE , DEBUFF , DEBUFF1 , DEBUFF2 , HIDE_RULE , INSERT_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS WHERE END_YN = '0' ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS (SEQ ,INSERT_DATE ,END_YN ,ATK_RATE ,ATK_POWER ,DEF_RATE ,DEF_POWER ,EVADE_RATE ,CRIT_DEF_RATE ,DEBUFF ,DEBUFF1 ,DEBUFF2 ,REWARD ,MAX_HP ,MAX_HP_EXT ,CUR_HP ,CUR_HP_EXT ,HIDE_RULE) SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 ,TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') ,'0' ,#{atkRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{atkPower, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{defRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{defPower, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{evadeRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{critDefRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 ,#{maxHp, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{maxHpExt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{maxHp, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{maxHpExt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{hideRule, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS

INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG (USER_NAME ,ROOM_NAME ,LV ,TARGET_MON_LV ,GAIN_EXP ,ATK_DMG ,MON_DMG ,ATK_CRIT_YN ,MON_PATTEN ,KILL_YN ,NOW_YN ,DROP_YN ,DEATH_YN ,LUCKY_YN ,BUFF_YN ,JOB_SKILL_YN ,JOB ,NIGHTMARE_YN) VALUES (#{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{roomName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{lv, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,999 ,0 ,#{atkDmg, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{monDmg, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{atkCritYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'0' ,#{killYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,#{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'2')
mapper.select: SELECT sum(cnt) over() as tot_cnt, A.* FROM ( SELECT user_name , count(user_name) as cnt , SUM(atk_dmg) AS score FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE nightmare_yn = '2' AND target_mon_lv = 999 AND atk_dmg > 0 AND insert_date >= to_date(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') GROUP BY user_name ORDER BY SUM(atk_dmg) DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT sum(cnt) over() as tot_cnt, A.* FROM ( SELECT user_name , count(user_name) as cnt , SUM(atk_dmg) AS score FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG b WHERE nightmare_yn = '2' AND target_mon_lv = 999 AND atk_dmg > 0 AND insert_date >= to_date(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY i WHERE i.user_name = b.user_name AND i.item_id BETWEEN 7000 AND 7999 AND NVL(i.del_yn, '0') = '0' ) GROUP BY user_name ORDER BY count(user_name) DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT SEQ , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , START_DATE , END_DATE FROM ( SELECT SEQ , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS START_DATE , to_char(PROC_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS END_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS WHERE END_YN = '1' ORDER BY PROC_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT USER_NAME , ITEM_ID , REWARD_DATE FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME , ITEM_ID , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'mm/dd hh24:mi') AS REWARD_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE GAIN_TYPE = 'BOSS_HELL' ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
